display.purpose: Page title in header. Hero heading only.

body.purpose: Menu item names and general body copy.

label.purpose: Category section numbers and small uppercase labels.

components.name: Category Button
components.description: Sticky horizontal-scroll category filter for menu sections.
components.css: .ds-cat-btn { flex-shrink: 0; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Alexandria', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #4C5A3E; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-cat-btn:hover { background: #4C5A3E25; } .ds-cat-btn--active { background: #4C5A3E; color: #fff; }

components.name: Menu Item Row
components.description: Single menu item with name and price in a flex row.
components.css: .ds-menu-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; padding: 0.55rem 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #d9d2c9; } .ds-menu-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-item-name { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; flex: 1; } .ds-item-price { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #4C5A3E; margin-left: 1rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Highlight Card
components.description: Informational card in the highlights grid.
components.html:
☕
100% Arabica
Specialty beans
components.css: .ds-hl-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.75rem; text-align: center; } .ds-hl-icon { font-size: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-hl-label { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: #4C5A3E; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-hl-desc { font-size: 0.65rem; color: #888; margin-top: 0.125rem; }

components.name: Language Toggle
components.description: Inline language switcher in the header.
components.css: .ds-lang-toggle { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #ffffffcc; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid #ffffff40; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-lang-toggle:hover { background: #ffffff15; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: A warm, earthy refuge. The design system for Andi's Coffee is a calm, confident visual identity built around a deliberate green (#4C5A3E). It feels like walking into a space where craft matters: the wood is oiled, the coffee is measured, and every surface has a place.
keyCharacteristics: Committed green palette that carries 30-60% of the surface
Serif display + warm sans body pairing
Flat surfaces with tonal layering, no shadows
Bilingual by default (Arabic RTL + English LTR)

rules.name: The Green Commitment Rule
rules.body: The primary green is not an accent — it IS the brand. It occupies the header, the active state, the footer, and price labels.

rules.name: The No-Beige Rule
rules.body: The background is Cream Paper tinted toward green, not generic beige. If the background looks like every other cafe site, it's wrong.

dos: Do use the green (#4C5A3E) as the dominant brand colour across header, footer, and active states.
Do show every menu price immediately — no taps, no reveals, no interaction required.
Do support English and Arabic as equals with instant toggle and no reload.
Do load the menu in under 2 seconds on Jordanian 3G/4G.
Do use flat surfaces with tonal layering instead of shadows.
donts: Don't hide prices behind taps or interaction.
Don't use heavy React SPAs that blank out on slow networks.
Don't use PDF menus requiring pinch-zoom on mobile.
Don't use beige-on-beige AI-generated cafe palettes, Fraunces fonts, or glassmorphism.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, or numbered section markers as decoration.
